source_rationale: RGS5 is a pericyte/perivascular marker, and its high expression in DDX4 AB+ cells suggests a perivascular-like identity in this sorted population
ACTA2 (alpha smooth muscle actin) is a canonical marker of smooth muscle/perivascular cells enriched in this population
TAGLN (transgelin) is a smooth muscle marker gene characteristic of perivascular/mural cells
MCAM (CD146) is a pericyte surface marker commonly used to identify perivascular cells
NOTCH3 is a key signaling receptor in pericytes and vascular smooth muscle cells
MYH11 is a smooth muscle myosin heavy chain, a definitive marker of smooth muscle/perivascular cells
Phospholamban is expressed in smooth muscle cells and pericytes, regulating calcium signaling
MYL9 is a myosin regulatory light chain expressed in smooth muscle and perivascular cells
Decorin is a proteoglycan highly expressed in stromal/fibroblast cells of the ovary
PDGFRA is a canonical marker of mesenchymal stromal/fibroblast cells
Collagen type I alpha 1 is a major extracellular matrix gene expressed by fibroblasts/stromal cells
SERPINE2 is a serine protease inhibitor expressed in ovarian stromal cells
Osteoglycin is a small leucine-rich proteoglycan characteristic of stromal/fibroblast populations
Steroidogenic acute regulatory protein is involved in steroidogenesis, marking ovarian theca/stromal cells
Complement C1s is produced by stromal fibroblasts and marks mesenchymal populations
HTRA1 is a serine protease expressed in ovarian stromal cells involved in extracellular matrix remodeling
Von Willebrand factor is a canonical endothelial cell marker involved in hemostasis
Claudin-5 is a tight junction protein specific to endothelial cells
CD34 is a well-established surface marker of vascular endothelial cells
EGFL7 is an endothelial-specific secreted factor critical for vascular development
CLEC14A is a C-type lectin specifically expressed on endothelial cells
Aquaporin 1 is a water channel highly expressed in vascular endothelial cells
PALMD is enriched in endothelial cells and associated with vascular biology
Carbonic anhydrase 4 is expressed on the luminal surface of endothelial cells
TM4SF1 is a transmembrane protein enriched in endothelial cells involved in angiogenesis
GNG11 is a G-protein subunit highly expressed in endothelial cells
Anti-Müllerian hormone is a canonical marker of granulosa cells in growing ovarian follicles
TNNI3 has been identified as a marker of granulosa cells in the human ovary
WFDC2 (HE4) is expressed in granulosa cells and is a known ovarian epithelial marker
Keratin 18 is an epithelial marker expressed in granulosa cells reflecting their epithelial nature
GSTA1 is a glutathione S-transferase enriched in granulosa cells involved in steroid metabolism
Keratin 8 is an epithelial cytokeratin characteristic of granulosa cells
Desmoplakin marks cell-cell junctions in epithelial granulosa cells
Prostaglandin D2 synthase is highly expressed in granulosa cells and involved in follicular function
EMX2 is a transcription factor expressed in granulosa cells important for ovarian development
HOPX is a homeodomain protein enriched in granulosa cells of the ovary
HLA-DRA is an MHC class II molecule highly expressed on antigen-presenting immune cells
CD74 is the MHC class II invariant chain, a canonical marker of antigen-presenting immune cells
TYROBP (DAP12) is an adaptor protein essential for innate immune cell signaling
C1QA is a complement component produced by macrophages and dendritic cells
AIF1 (IBA1) is a well-known marker of macrophages and microglia
CD14 is a canonical monocyte/macrophage surface marker
FCER1G is an Fc receptor gamma chain expressed on myeloid immune cells
Lysozyme is a canonical marker of monocytes and macrophages
CCL5 (RANTES) is a chemokine produced by T cells and NK cells within the immune compartment
NKG7 is expressed in cytotoxic lymphocytes including NK cells and T cells
CD52 is a glycoprotein broadly expressed on lymphocytes and monocytes
CD163 is a scavenger receptor and canonical marker of tissue-resident macrophages/monocytes
Lysozyme is a canonical monocyte/macrophage marker involved in innate immunity
C1QA complement component is highly expressed by tissue macrophages
C1QB is a complement subunit produced by monocytes/macrophages
C1QC completes the complement C1q complex, a hallmark of tissue macrophages
CD14 is the classical monocyte surface marker and LPS co-receptor
AIF1 (IBA1) is a macrophage/monocyte-specific calcium-binding protein
Cathepsin S is a cysteine protease involved in MHC class II antigen processing in monocytes
MS4A7 is a membrane-spanning protein specifically expressed in monocytes/macrophages
FOLR2 is a folate receptor marking tissue-resident macrophages
LYVE1 marks a subset of tissue-resident macrophages associated with vasculature
Stabilin-1 is a scavenger receptor expressed on tissue macrophages
FGL2 (fibrinogen-like 2) is expressed by macrophages and involved in immune regulation
Cystatin C is highly expressed in monocytes/macrophages and dendritic cells
Zona pellucida glycoprotein 3 is a canonical oocyte-specific marker forming the egg coat
FIGLA is an oocyte-specific transcription factor essential for folliculogenesis
NLRP5 is a maternal-effect gene specifically expressed in oocytes
DPPA3 (Stella) is a germ cell-specific gene essential for oocyte development
ZAR1 is an oocyte-specific RNA-binding protein critical for early embryogenesis
OOSP2 is an oocyte-secreted protein specifically expressed in female germ cells
KPNA7 is an importin alpha specifically expressed in oocytes for nuclear transport
FOXR1 is a forkhead transcription factor with oocyte-enriched expression
STAG3 is a meiosis-specific cohesin subunit essential for oocyte chromosome segregation
UCHL1 (PGP9.5) is highly expressed in oocytes and used as a germ cell marker
GYG1 is involved in glycogen synthesis and is enriched in oocytes for energy storage
EPCAM marks oocytes and early germ cells in the human ovary
RGS5 is a canonical pericyte marker regulating G-protein signaling in perivascular cells
Transgelin is a smooth muscle/pericyte marker involved in cytoskeletal organization
Alpha smooth muscle actin is a definitive marker of pericytes and vascular smooth muscle cells
Smooth muscle myosin heavy chain is specific to contractile perivascular/smooth muscle cells
MCAM (CD146) is a well-established pericyte surface marker
Phospholamban is expressed in smooth muscle/pericytes regulating calcium handling
Myosin light chain 9 is a smooth muscle contractile protein marking perivascular cells
NDUFA4L2 is a hypoxia-responsive gene enriched in pericytes
RERGL is enriched in perivascular/smooth muscle cells of the ovary
HIGD1B is a mitochondrial protein enriched in pericytes under hypoxic conditions
Decorin is a hallmark extracellular matrix proteoglycan of stromal fibroblasts
PDGFRA is a canonical fibroblast/stromal cell surface receptor
Collagen type I alpha 1 is a major structural protein produced by stromal fibroblasts
Collagen type I alpha 2 complements COL1A1 as a fibroblast/stromal marker
Osteoglycin is a proteoglycan characteristic of ovarian stromal cells
Claudin-11 marks ovarian stromal cells and is involved in cell-cell adhesion
STAR is the steroidogenic acute regulatory protein marking steroidogenic ovarian stromal/theca cells
APOE is expressed by stromal cells involved in lipid metabolism and steroidogenesis
Complement C1s is produced by fibroblasts/stromal cells as part of innate immunity
Retinol binding protein 1 is expressed in stromal cells involved in retinoid metabolism
SERPINE2 is a serine protease inhibitor expressed by ovarian stromal fibroblasts
CD3D is a component of the T cell receptor complex and a definitive T cell marker
CD3E is another TCR complex subunit and canonical T cell lineage marker
CCL5 (RANTES) is a chemokine highly expressed by effector/memory T cells
IL7R (CD127) is a key cytokine receptor marking T cells, especially naive and memory subsets
CD2 is a T cell and NK cell surface adhesion molecule
Granzyme K is expressed by cytotoxic T cells and marks effector T cell populations
Granzyme A is a serine protease in cytotoxic T lymphocytes
NKG7 is expressed in cytotoxic T cells and NK cells, marking effector lymphocytes
IL32 is a pro-inflammatory cytokine predominantly expressed by T cells
PTPRC (CD45) is a pan-leukocyte marker with high expression on T cells
KLRB1 (CD161) marks specific T cell subsets including mucosal-associated invariant T cells
CD69 is an early T cell activation marker highly expressed on tissue-resident T cells
Interferon gamma is a hallmark cytokine of activated T cells, especially Th1 and cytotoxic T cells
